name: Colonial Heights Middle School
description: Colonial Heights Middle School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Colonial Heights, VA. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include lights. The courts are free.

name: Lakeview Park
description: Lakeview Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Colonial Heights, VA. There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are not available. The facility includes amenities like lights and restrooms. The courts are free.
